old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-oxww","title":"[cross-impl] trickle half-interval bias for odd I","description":"Python uses (interval+1)//2 for half in _begin_interval:line69; Rust/C use interval/2:line112 (rs), line38 (c). For I=5: Py transmits in [now+3,now+5), Rust/C in [now+2,now+4). RFC 6206 says [I/2,I); different distributions break test vector consistency across impls. See trickle.py:69, trickle.rs:112, trickle.c:38. Python comment claims RFC match but math differs from ports.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-22T23:59:20.10693766Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:59:20.10693766Z"}
